creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
clsung      2008-01-24 02:15:59 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    www/p5-WWW-DHL       Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  This module allows you to check the status of YOUR shipments via the
  DHL website. For privacy issues please consider the website. Please
  note: This module is still some kind of alpha, because there are many
  different pages on the DHL website.
  
  WWW:    http://search.cpan.org/dist/WWW-DHL/
  
  PR:             ports/119518
  Submitted by:   Gea-Suan Lin <gslin at gslin.org>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1956    +1 -0      ports/www/Makefile
  1.1       +23 -0     ports/www/p5-WWW-DHL/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/www/p5-WWW-DHL/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/www/p5-WWW-DHL/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/www/p5-WWW-DHL/pkg-plist (new)
